MODULE: cosmos.agents.swarm_orchestrator
FILE: cosmos/agents/swarm_orchestrator.py (2555 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Swarm Orchestrator - Multi-Agent Coordination

Novel Approaches:
1. Dynamic Agent Spawning - Create agents on demand
2. Capability-Based Routing - Match tasks to best agent
3. Parallel Execution - Run independent subtasks concurrently
4. Emergent Behavior - Allow agent team compositions to ev

CLASSES:
- TaskStatus(Enum): Status of a swarm task.
- SwarmTask: A task managed by the swarm.
- SwarmState: State of the entire swarm.
- SwarmOrchestrator: Orchestrates multiple agents working together.

  Methods: async def spawn_agent(self, agent_type: str) -> Optional[BaseAgent]
